# Benchmark reference

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_benchmark_manual.py; do not edit. -->

This catalog is generated from every active kernel `compile.all` command. Each
implementation page presents the central kernel first, the reached local
include implementations, the canonical intrinsic surface, exact build
commands, and required data objects.

**Coverage:** 62 active build variants, 29 source-backed
implementations, and 14 benchmark families.

| Family | Implementations | Build variants | Intrinsic surface |
| --- | ---: | ---: | --- |
| [broadcast](catalog/one-level/broadcast/index.md) | 4 | 6 | 11 intrinsics |
| [concat](catalog/one-level/concat/index.md) | 2 | 4 | 11 intrinsics |
| [control](catalog/one-level/control/index.md) | 1 | 6 | 16 intrinsics |
| [element_wise/gelu](catalog/one-level/element-wise-gelu/index.md) | 1 | 1 | 10 intrinsics |
| [fa](catalog/one-level/fa/index.md) | 2 | 9 | 23 intrinsics |
| [gather](catalog/one-level/gather/index.md) | 1 | 1 | 3 intrinsics |
| [matmul](catalog/one-level/matmul/index.md) | 3 | 16 | 11 intrinsics |
| [pto_kernels](catalog/one-level/pto-kernels/index.md) | 9 | 9 | 7 intrinsics |
| [reduction/reducemax_col](catalog/one-level/reduction-reducemax-col/index.md) | 1 | 1 | 5 intrinsics |
| [reduction/reducemax_row](catalog/one-level/reduction-reducemax-row/index.md) | 1 | 1 | 5 intrinsics |
| [reduction/reducesum_col](catalog/one-level/reduction-reducesum-col/index.md) | 1 | 2 | 5 intrinsics |
| [reduction/reducesum_row](catalog/one-level/reduction-reducesum-row/index.md) | 1 | 1 | 5 intrinsics |
| [sort](catalog/one-level/sort/index.md) | 1 | 1 | 2 intrinsics |
| [transpose](catalog/one-level/transpose/index.md) | 1 | 4 | 11 intrinsics |

## Reading a Benchmark Page

1. Start with **Kernel structure** and **Core kernel** for the algorithm.
2. Expand the benchmark entrypoint or additional implementation files when needed.
3. Use **Intrinsic sequence** to open each C++ operation contract.
4. Reproduce a listed command from the directory shown on the page.

Only active C++ tile-kernel entrypoints are published here. Retired repository
surfaces remain outside the programming manual.
